violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw ground meat above fish and whole muscle meat in walk in cooler.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Need to elevate drain pipe so it sits above the plane of the drain.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Cracked tiles in prep area in back.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -2 mops sitting in bucket.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area. -Employee on cook line eating food.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Right prep cooler at 50F.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. -Large plastic container of curry soup at 45F from previous day.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing raw beef and chicken. -1 package of sous vide chicken was disposed of. -Packages of raw beef and ground beef in freezer and in cooler not dated.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
